mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.lgn_log ( user_oid, user_id, lgn_dt, lgn_rslt, lgn_fail_rsn, ip_addr, user_agt, brwsr_nm, brwsr_ver, os_nm, os_ver, dvc_type, ssn_id, lgt_dt, ssn_contn_hr, ntn_cd, cty_nm, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt ) VALUES ( #{userOid}, #{userId}, #{lgnDt}, #{lgnRslt}, #{lgnFailRsn}, #{ipAddr}, #{userAgt}, #{brwsrNm}, #{brwsrVer}, #{osNm}, #{osVer}, #{dvcType}, #{ssnId}, #{lgtDt}, #{ssnContnHr}, #{ntnCd}, #{ctyNm}, IFNULL(#{regId}, 'SYSTEM'), IFNULL(#{regDt}, NOW()), IFNULL(#{mdfcnId}, 'SYSTEM'), IFNULL(#{mdfcnDt}, NOW()) )
mapper.update: UPDATE ${schema}.lgn_log l INNER JOIN ${schema}.user u ON l.user_oid = u.user_oid SET l.lgt_dt = #{baseTime}, l.ssn_contn_hr = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, l.lgn_dt, #{baseTime}) WHERE l.lgt_dt IS NULL AND l.lgn_dt < #{baseTime} AND u.user_authrt = #{userRole}
UPDATE ${schema}.user SET lgn_fail_cnt = 0, last_login_dt = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE ${schema}.user SET lgn_fail_cnt = lgn_fail_cnt + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.user_acs_log ( user_oid, user_id, acs_type, rqt_uri, rqt_mthd, rqt_qry, rqt_bdy_sz, stts_cd, rspns_bdy_sz, rspns_time_ms, error_msg, rfpr_url, rfpr_type, srch_kywd, ip_addr, user_agt, brwsr_nm, brwsr_ver, os_nm, os_ver, dvc_type, ssn_id, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{userOid}, #{userId}, #{acsType}, #{rqtUri}, #{rqtMthd}, #{rqtQry}, #{rqtBdySz}, #{sttsCd}, #{rspnsBdySz}, #{rspnsTimeMs}, #{errorMsg}, #{rfprUrl}, #{rfprType}, #{srchKywd}, #{ipAddr}, #{userAgt}, #{brwsrNm}, #{brwsrVer}, #{osNm}, #{osVer}, #{dvcType}, #{ssnId}, IFNULL(#{regId}, 'SYSTEM'), IFNULL(#{regDt}, NOW()) )
mapper.select: SELECT user_oid, user_id, prvc_use_yn FROM ${schema}.user WHERE prvc_use_yn = 'Y' AND prvc_end_dt < NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE ${schema}.user SET prvc_use_yn = 'N', mdfcn_id = 'SYSTEM', mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE prvc_use_yn = 'Y' AND prvc_end_dt < NOW()
